ns0:entry.ns0:title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BurntSushi/ripgrep
Language: rust
ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

ns0:entry.ns0:title: antinomyhq/forgecode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/antinomyhq/forgecode
Language: rust
AI enabled pair programmer for Claude, GPT, O Series, Grok, Deepseek, Gemini and 300+ models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloud-hypervisor/cloud-hypervisor
Language: rust
A Virtual Machine Monitor for modern Cloud workloads. Features include CPU, memory and device hotplug, support for running Windows and Linux guests, device offload with vhost-user and a minimal compact footprint. Written in Rust with a strong focus on security.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dani-garcia/vaultwarden
Language: rust
Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farion1231/cc-switch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch
Language: rust
A cross-platform desktop All-in-One assistant tool for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, openclaw & Gemini CLI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lance-format/lance
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lance-format/lance
Language: rust
Open Lakehouse Format for Multimodal AI. Convert from Parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

ns0:entry.ns0:title: linera-io/linera-protocol
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/linera-io/linera-protocol
Language: rust
Main repository for the Linera protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mayocream/koharu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mayocream/koharu
Language: rust
ML-powered manga translator, written in Rust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
Language: rust
Production-grade Rust-native trading engine with deterministic event-driven architecture

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/codex
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/codex
Language: rust
Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: oxc-project/oxc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc
Language: rust
⚓ A collection of high-performance JavaScript tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: raine/workmux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/raine/workmux
Language: rust
git worktrees + tmux windows for zero-friction parallel dev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rustdesk/rustdesk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rustdesk/rustdesk
Language: rust
An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: screenpipe/screenpipe
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/screenpipe/screenpipe
Language: rust
run agents that work for you in the background based on what you do

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sunface/rust-by-practice
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sunface/rust-by-practice
Language: rust
Learning Rust By Practice, narrowing the gap between beginner and skilled-dev through challenging examples, exercises and projects.
